embedData.html:
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>

/* === WIX TEMPLATE OVERRIDE === */
#SITE_HEADER, #SITE_FOOTER, #PAGES_CONTAINER, #masterPage > header, 
#masterPage > footer, [data-mesh-id], #WIX_ADS, #SITE_PAGES,
[id^="comp-"], .wixui-rich-text, [data-testid="richTextElement"],
#SCROLL_TO_TOP, #SITE_CONTAINER > header, 
main[id], section[data-block-level-container] {
  display: none !important;
  visibility: hidden !important;
  height: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}
#SITE_CONTAINER, #masterPage, #PAGES_CONTAINER, #SITE_PAGES {
  display: block !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
  height: auto !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}
body {
  background: #07111C !important;
  color: #FFFFFF !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

/* === MI CLEAN GROUP SITE CSS === */
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
/* Visible focus ring for keyboard navigation */
:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #C9A96E;outline-offset:2px}
a:focus-visible,button:focus-visible,input:focus-visible,textarea:focus-visible,select:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #C9A96E;outline-offset:2px}
:root{
  --bg:#07111C;--bg2:#0D1E2E;--bg3:#152538;
  --gold:#C9A96E;--gold2:#E8C98A;
  --white:#FFFFFF;--muted:#7A94A8;
  --border:rgba(201,169,110,.18);--border2:rgba(201,169,110,.35);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--white);overflow-x:hidden}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#7A5530;border-radius:2px}
a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit}

#nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:999;height:64px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 48px;background:rgba(7,17,28,.96);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);backdrop-filter:blur(20px)}
.n-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
.n-mark{width:36px;height:36px;border:1.5px solid var(--gold);border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
.n-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase}
.n-sub{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.14em;margin-top:2px}
.n-links{display:flex;gap:28px;list-style:none}
.n-links a{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);transition:color .2s}
.n-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.n-cta{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bg);background:var(--gold);padding:10px 22px;border-radius:2px}
@media(max-width:820px){.n-links{display:none}#nav{padding:0 20px}}

.cover{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;min-height:100vh;padding-top:64px}
.cov-l{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:72px 40px 72px 64px;position:relative}
.cov-l::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:0;top:12%;bottom:12%;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,var(--gold),transparent)}
.eye{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.36em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:30px}
.eye::before{content:'';width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--gold)}
.h1{font-size:clamp(40px,5.5vw,70px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin-bottom:24px}
.h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}
.cov-p{font-size:14px;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);line-height:1.9;max-width:420px;margin-bottom:44px}
.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);width:fit-content;margin-bottom:44px}
.st{background:var(--bg);padding:18px 24px;min-width:108px}
.st-n{font-size:34px;font-weight:300;color:var(--gold);line-height:1}
.st-l{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:5px}
.cov-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.24em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);padding-bottom:9px;transition:gap .3s}
.cov-link:hover{gap:22px}
.cov-r{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.cov-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.35) saturate(.6);position:absolute;inset:0}
.cov-r::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--bg) 0%,transparent 50%)}
.cov-badge{position:absolute;bottom:36px;right:36px;z-index:2;width:96px;height:96px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--gold);background:rgba(7,17,28,.85);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center}
.cov-badge b{font-size:28px;font-weight:300;color:var(--gold);line-height:1}
.cov-badge span{font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:3px}
@media(max-width:820px){.cover{grid-template-columns:1fr}.cov-r{display:none}.cov-l::after{display:none}.cov-l{padding:60px 24px}}

.sec{padding:96px 64px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.sec-cream{background:#F5F0E8}
@media(max-width:820px){.sec{padding:64px 24px}}
.sec-top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:48px;align-items:start;margin-bottom:56px}
@media(max-width:820px){.sec-top{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.eyebrow{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.36em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:18px}
.h2{font-size:clamp(26px,3.5vw,46px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-.02em}
.h2 b{font-weight:600;color:var(--gold)}
.sec-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.85;padding-top:4px}
.sec-desc-dark{font-size:13px;color:#5a6878;line-height:1.85;padding-top:4px}
.tag{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px;margin-right:6px}
.eco{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5ecea0;border:1px solid rgba(94,206,160,.3);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px}

.cat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;background:var(--border)}
@media(max-width:820px){.cat-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.cc{position:relative;aspect-ratio:1/1.15;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg2)}
.cc-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.35) saturate(.6);transition:transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),filter .5s}
.cc:hover .cc-img{transform:scale(1.07);filter:brightness(.25) saturate(.5)}
.cc-body{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:22px 20px;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(7,17,28,.97) 0%,transparent 100%)}
.cc-n{font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.22em;margin-bottom:6px}
.cc-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:400;line-height:1.25;margin-bottom:8px}
.cc-meta{font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.cc-meta::before{content:'';width:16px;height:1px;background:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0}
.cc-bar{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);width:0;transition:width .5s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}
.cc:hover .cc-bar{width:100%}

.sub{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);padding:9px 0;margin:48px 0 24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.sub big{font-size:21px;font-weight:300;color:var(--white);letter-spacing:-.01em;text-transform:none}

.pg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1px;background:var(--border)}
.pg3{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr))}
.pc{background:var(--bg2);overflow:hidden;position:relative;transition:background .25s}
.pc:hover{background:var(--bg3)}
.pc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .35s}
.pc:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.pc-img{width:100%;height:152px;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.72) saturate(.75);transition:filter .35s;display:block}
.pc:hover .pc-img{filter:brightness(.9) saturate(1)}
.pc-body{padding:24px}
.pc-code{font-size:8px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:9px;font-weight:700}
.pc-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:400;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:13px}
.pc-hr{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin-bottom:13px}
.pc-ul{list-style:none}
.pc-ul li{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);padding:2.5px 0;line-height:1.65;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px}
.pc-ul li::before{content:'—';color:var(--gold);font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px}
.pc-foot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:16px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.pc-pkg{font-size:9.5px;color:var(--muted)}
.pc-del{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,169,110,.1);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:2px}
.pc-noimg{width:100%;height:152px;background:var(--bg3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:44px;opacity:.5;position:relative}
.pc-noimg::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at 60% 40%,rgba(201,169,110,.08),transparent 70%)}

.tbl-w{overflow-x:auto;margin-bottom:20px}
.tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:560px}
.tbl thead tr{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.tbl th{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.26em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);padding:11px 16px;text-align:left}
.tbl td{font-size:12.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);padding:11px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);line-height:1.5;vertical-align:middle}
.tbl tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:var(--white)}
.tn{color:var(--white)!important;font-weight:500}
.tm{color:var(--muted)!important;font-size:11px!important}
.note{background:rgba(201,169,110,.07);border-left:2px solid var(--gold);padding:13px 18px;margin-top:20px}
.note p{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8}
.note strong{color:var(--gold)}

.am-split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
@media(max-width:820px){.am-split{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.am-vis{position:relative;overflow:hidden;min-height:520px}
.am-vis img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.4) saturate(.65);position:absolute;inset:0}
.am-body{background:var(--bg2);padding:72px 56px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
@media(max-width:820px){.am-body{padding:48px 24px}.am-vis{min-height:280px}}
.s-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin:26px 0}
.ser{background:rgba(201,169,110,.07);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:17px;border-radius:2px}
.ser.prem{background:rgba(201,169,110,.13);border-color:var(--border2)}
.ser-lbl{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px}
.ser-desc{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7}
.pills{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:8px}
.pill{padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid var(--border);text-align:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.02)}
.pn{font-size:12px;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:3px}
.ps{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted)}

.svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--border)}
@media(max-width:820px){.svc-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
@media(max-width:480px){.svc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.svc{background:var(--bg2);padding:30px 26px;transition:background .25s}
.svc:hover{background:var(--bg3)}
.svc-ico{font-size:22px;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1}
.svc-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:9px;line-height:1.3}
.svc-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:15px}
.svc-tags{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.svc-tag{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 10px;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);border-radius:20px}

.why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(201,169,110,.2)}
@media(max-width:820px){.why-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.why{background:#F5F0E8;padding:28px 24px}
.why-ico{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1}
.why-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:#0D1E2E;margin-bottom:8px}
.why-desc{font-size:12px;color:#5a6878;line-height:1.7}
.steps{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(201,169,110,.2);margin-top:2px}
@media(max-width:820px){.steps{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.step{background:#F5F0E8;padding:24px 20px}
.step-n{font-size:40px;font-weight:300;color:rgba(9,75,135,.15);line-height:1;margin-bottom:14px}
.step-t{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#0D1E2E;margin-bottom:6px}
.step-d{font-size:11.5px;color:#5a6878;line-height:1.65}

.contact{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;min-height:80vh;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
@media(max-width:820px){.contact{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.ct-l{padding:88px 56px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;border-right:1px solid var(--border)}
@media(max-width:820px){.ct-l{padding:64px 24px}}
.ci{display:flex;gap:20px;padding:17px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.ci-lbl{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);min-width:76px;margin-top:3px;flex-shrink:0}
.ci-val{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);line-height:1.6;font-weight:300}
.ci-val strong{color:var(--white);font-weight:500}
.cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.26em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bg);background:var(--gold);padding:17px 34px;border-radius:2px;margin-top:34px;transition:background .2s}
.cta:hover{background:var(--gold2)}
.social{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:18px}
.social a{font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);padding:8px 16px;letter-spacing:.12em;transition:all .2s}
.social a:hover{color:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold)}
.ct-r{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.ct-r img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.2) saturate(.5);position:absolute;inset:0}
.ct-r-body{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:64px 48px;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(7,17,28,.9) 0%,transparent 100%)}
@media(max-width:820px){.ct-r{display:none}}

footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:24px 64px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
@media(max-width:560px){footer{padding:22px 20px;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}}
.ft-c{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)}
.ft-b{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold)}

.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease}
.rv.in{opacity:1;transform:none}


#toast-container{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:9999;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;pointer-events:none}
.toast{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--white);padding:14px 20px;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;max-width:340px;pointer-events:auto;animation:slideIn .3s ease;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px}
.toast.success{border-left:3px solid #4ade80}.toast.error{border-left:3px solid #f87171}
.toast-x{margin-left:auto;cursor:pointer;opacity:.5;padding-left:8px}.toast-x:hover{opacity:1}
@keyframes slideIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:5000;background:rgba(7,17,28,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}
.modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
.modal{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:4px;width:100%;max-width:560px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;transform:translateY(24px);transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}
.modal-overlay.open .modal{transform:none}
.modal-head{padding:24px 28px 18px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.modal-title{font-size:18px;font-weight:400}.modal-close{font-size:24px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;line-height:1;padding:0}.modal-close:hover{color:var(--white)}
.modal-body{padding:24px 28px 28px}
.frow{margin-bottom:16px}.frow label{display:block;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:7px}
.frow input,.frow textarea,.frow select{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--white);padding:11px 13px;font-size:13px;border-radius:3px;transition:border .2s;outline:none;font-family:inherit}
.frow input:focus,.frow textarea:focus,.frow select:focus{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(255,255,255,.07)}
.frow textarea{min-height:96px;resize:vertical}.frow select option{background:var(--bg2)}
.fgrid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px}
@media(max-width:480px){.fgrid2{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.frow-ck{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}.frow-ck input{width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0}.frow-ck span{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}
.fcat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:7px;margin-top:6px}
.fcat-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px 11px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;transition:border .2s,background .2s}
.fcat-item:hover{background:rgba(201,169,110,.06)}.fcat-item input{width:13px;height:13px;accent-color:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0}
.fcat-item.checked{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,169,110,.08)}.fcat-item span{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
.btn-sub{width:100%;background:var(--gold);color:var(--bg);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:15px;border:none;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;font-family:inherit;margin-top:8px}
.btn-sub:hover{background:var(--gold2)}.btn-sub:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}
.ferr{font-size:11px;color:#f87171;margin-top:4px;display:none}
#sbar{position:sticky;top:64px;z-index:100;background:rgba(7,17,28,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:11px 64px;display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:center;position:relative}
@media(max-width:820px){#sbar{padding:10px 14px;flex-wrap:wrap}}
#sinput{flex:1;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--white);padding:9px 13px;font-size:13px;border-radius:3px;outline:none;transition:border .2s;font-family:inherit;min-width:160px}
#sinput:focus{border-color:var(--gold)}#sinput::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}
.fbtn{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:7px 12px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;font-family:inherit}
.fbtn:hover,.fbtn.active{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,169,110,.08)}
#sres{display:none;position:absolute;top:100%;left:64px;right:64px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;max-height:340px;overflow-y:auto;z-index:200}
@media(max-width:820px){#sres{left:8px;right:8px}}
.sri{padding:11px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px}
.sri:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)}.sri:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.sri-img{width:36px;height:36px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:2px;filter:brightness(.8);flex-shrink:0}
.sri-name{font-size:12px;color:var(--white)}.sri-cat{font-size:8px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px}
.sri-id{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px}.sri-none{padding:14px;text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}
#qfloat{position:fixed;bottom:26px;right:26px;z-index:4000;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;background:var(--gold);color:var(--bg);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;border:none;font-family:inherit;transition:background .2s,transform .2s;box-shadow:0 6px 26px rgba(201,169,110,.25)}
#qfloat:hover{background:var(--gold2);transform:translateY(-2px)}
@media(max-width:480px){#qfloat span{display:none}#qfloat{padding:12px}}
@keyframes spin2{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.btn-sub.loading::after{content:'';display:inline-block;width:11px;height:11px;border:2px solid var(--bg);border-top-color:transparent;border-radius:50%;animation:spin2 .6s linear infinite;margin-left:9px;vertical-align:middle}


/* ── Scroll progress bar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#scroll-progress{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);width:0%;z-index:10000;transition:width .1s linear;pointer-events:none}

/* ── Back to top ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#back-top{position:fixed;bottom:26px;left:26px;z-index:4000;width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(13,30,46,.9);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--gold);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s,transform .2s;font-size:16px}
#back-top.show{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
#back-top:hover{background:var(--bg3);transform:translateY(-2px)}

/* ── WhatsApp float ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#wafloat{position:fixed;bottom:82px;right:26px;z-index:4000;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;background:#25D366;color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(37,211,102,.35);transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s}
#wafloat:hover{transform:scale(1.1);box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(37,211,102,.5)}
@media(max-width:480px){#wafloat{bottom:74px;right:16px}}

/* ── Product badges ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pc-badges{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;z-index:2;pointer-events:none}
.bdg{font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:2px}
.bdg-haccp{background:rgba(94,206,160,.18);color:#5ecea0;border:1px solid rgba(94,206,160,.35)}
.bdg-eco{background:rgba(101,188,98,.12);color:#7dd87a;border:1px solid rgba(101,188,98,.28)}

/* ── Card add button ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pc-add{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;background:rgba(7,17,28,.75);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--gold);font-size:15px;font-weight:300;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;opacity:0;z-index:3;font-family:inherit;line-height:1}
.pc:hover .pc-add,.pc-add.added{opacity:1}
.pc-add:hover{background:rgba(201,169,110,.15);border-color:var(--gold)}
.pc-add.added{background:rgba(201,169,110,.2);border-color:var(--gold);font-size:12px}

/* ── Skeleton loader ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.sk-item{padding:11px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px}
.sk-thumb{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0}
.sk-lines{flex:1}
.sk-l{height:9px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:6px}
.sk-l:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.sk-thumb,.sk-l{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.04) 25%,rgba(255,255,255,.09) 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.04) 75%);background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 1.4s infinite}
@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:200% 0}100%{background-position:-200% 0}}

/* ── Empty search state ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.sri-empty{padding:26px 16px;text-align:center}
.sri-empty svg{opacity:.3;display:block;margin:0 auto 12px}
.sri-empty p{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7}
.sri-empty span{color:var(--gold)}

/* ── Subcategory pills ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#sub-pills{background:rgba(7,17,28,.97);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);overflow-x:auto;white-space:nowrap;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none;display:none}
#sub-pills::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
#sub-pills.open{display:block;padding:8px 64px}
@media(max-width:820px){#sub-pills.open{padding:8px 14px}}
.spill{display:inline-block;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 13px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;margin-right:5px}
.spill:hover,.spill.active{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,169,110,.06)}

/* ── Sort select ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#ssort{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;padding:8px 10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg);color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none}
#ssort:hover,#ssort:focus{border-color:rgba(201,169,110,.5);color:var(--gold);outline:none}
#ssort option{background:var(--bg2);color:var(--white)}

/* ── Product detail modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.modal-lg{max-width:680px}
.dm-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:220px 1fr}
@media(max-width:560px){.dm-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.dm-img{width:100%;height:260px;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.78) saturate(.8);display:block}
.dm-noimg{width:100%;height:260px;background:var(--bg3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:48px;opacity:.4}
@media(max-width:560px){.dm-img,.dm-noimg{height:180px}}
.dm-info{padding:22px 24px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:65vh}
.dm-code{font-size:8px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px}
.dm-name{font-size:18px;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:14px}
.dm-specs{list-style:none;margin-bottom:4px}
.dm-specs li{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);padding:3px 0;line-height:1.65;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px}
.dm-specs li::before{content:'—';color:var(--gold);font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px}
.dm-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11.5px;gap:12px}
.dm-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.dm-label{color:var(--muted);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;flex-shrink:0}
.dm-val{color:var(--white);font-weight:400;text-align:right}
.dm-footer{padding:15px 24px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;flex-shrink:0}
.dm-add{flex:1;background:var(--gold);color:var(--bg);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:13px 20px;border:none;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;font-family:inherit}
.dm-add:hover{background:var(--gold2)}
.dm-add.dm-added{background:transparent;color:var(--gold);border:1px solid var(--gold)}
.dm-cancel{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;white-space:nowrap}
.dm-cancel:hover{color:var(--white)}

/* ── Compare bar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#cmp-bar{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:3500;background:var(--bg2);border-top:1px solid var(--border2);padding:12px 64px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:16px;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}
#cmp-bar.open{display:flex;transform:none}
@media(max-width:820px){#cmp-bar{padding:12px 16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}}
.cmp-slots{display:flex;gap:8px;flex:1}
.cmp-slot{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);min-width:140px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px}
.cmp-slot.filled{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--white)}
.cmp-slot-rm{background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;line-height:1;padding:0;flex-shrink:0}
.cmp-slot-rm:hover{color:#f87171}
.cmp-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0}
.cmp-btn{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:10px 18px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:background .2s}
.cmp-go{background:var(--gold);color:var(--bg);border:none}
.cmp-go:hover{background:var(--gold2)}
.cmp-clear{background:transparent;color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.cmp-clear:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}
.cmp-count{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap}

/* ── Compare modal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.modal-xl{max-width:860px}
.cmp-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
.cmp-tbl th{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);text-align:left}
.cmp-tbl td{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);vertical-align:top;line-height:1.6}
.cmp-tbl tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02)}
.cmp-tbl td:first-child{color:var(--muted);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap;width:120px}
.cmp-img{width:100%;height:80px;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.75);border-radius:2px;display:block;margin-bottom:6px}
.cmp-noimg{width:100%;height:80px;background:var(--bg3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:6px}

/* ── Compare button on card ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pc-cmp{position:absolute;top:42px;right:10px;background:rgba(7,17,28,.75);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;opacity:0;z-index:3;font-family:inherit}
.pc:hover .pc-cmp,.pc-cmp.in-cmp{opacity:1}
.pc-cmp:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,169,110,.1)}
.pc-cmp.in-cmp{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,169,110,.15)}

/* ── Section TOC indicator ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#sec-toc{position:fixed;right:18px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:3000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}
#sec-toc.show{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
@media(max-width:900px){#sec-toc{display:none}}
@media print{#sec-toc{display:none!important}}
.toc-dot{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;cursor:pointer}
.toc-dot-inner{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid rgba(201,169,110,.4);background:transparent;transition:all .25s;flex-shrink:0}
.toc-dot:hover .toc-dot-inner,.toc-dot.active .toc-dot-inner{background:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold);width:9px;height:9px}
.toc-label{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;transform:translateX(6px);transition:all .2s;pointer-events:none}
.toc-dot:hover .toc-label{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}

/* ── Print button ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#print-btn{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:8px 13px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
#print-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}
#print-btn svg{flex-shrink:0}

/* ── @media print ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media print{
  *{-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact!important;print-color-adjust:exact!important}
  #scroll-progress,#back-top,#wafloat,#qfloat,#cmp-bar,#modal-detail,#modal-cmp,
  .modal-overlay,nav,#sbar,#sub-pills,.cover,#xidmetler,#contact,footer,
  .skip-link,#print-btn{display:none!important}
  body{background:#fff!important;color:#111!important;margin:0;padding:0}
  .print-header{display:block!important}
  #overview{padding:16px 24px!important}
  .sec-eye{color:#888!important;font-size:8px!important}
  .sec-h2{color:#111!important;font-size:18px!important}
  .pgrid{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)!important;gap:12px!important;padding:0!important}
  .pc{background:#f9f9f9!important;border:1px solid #ddd!important;border-radius:4px!important;break-inside:avoid!important;page-break-inside:avoid!important}
  .pc.hidden{display:none!important}
  .pc-thumb{height:100px!important}
  .pc-img{height:100px!important}
  .pc-body{padding:8px!important}
  .pc-name{color:#111!important;font-size:10px!important}
  .pc-code{color:#666!important;font-size:8px!important}
  .pc-ul li{color:#444!important;font-size:8px!important}
  .pc-meta{border-top:1px solid #eee!important}
  .pc-meta span{color:#555!important;font-size:8px!important}
  .pc-add,.pc-cmp,.pc-badges{display:none!important}
  .bdg-haccp,.bdg-eco{display:inline-block!important;font-size:7px!important;color:#333!important;background:#eee!important;border:1px solid #ccc!important}
  .cat-head{color:#111!important}
  a{text-decoration:none!important;color:inherit!important}
  @page{margin:16mm 12mm;size:A4}
}

/* ── Print header (visible only in print) ────────────────────────────────── */
.print-header{display:none;padding:0 0 14px;margin-bottom:16px;border-bottom:2px solid #C9A96E}
.print-header h2{margin:0 0 2px;font-size:16px;color:#111;letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:700}
.print-header p{margin:0;font-size:9px;color:#666}
.print-header .ph-meta{font-size:8px;color:#999;margin-top:4px}

/* ── Basket counter ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#qfloat-cnt{background:var(--bg);color:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;width:19px;height:19px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--gold);line-height:1}

/* ── Basket box in quote modal ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
#qbasket-box{background:rgba(201,169,110,.06);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:16px;display:none}
.qb-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px}
.qb-list{list-style:none;max-height:90px;overflow-y:auto}
.qb-list li{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);padding:2px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.qb-list li span.qb-code{color:var(--muted);font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:auto}
</style>
